nasb.text: I did not eat any tasty food, nor did meat or wine enter my mouth, nor did I use any ointment at all until the entire three weeks were completed.

esv.text: I ate no delicacies, no meat or wine entered my mouth, nor did I anoint myself at all, for the full three weeks.

cnv.text: 美味的食物我沒有吃，肉和酒沒有入我的口，我也沒有用膏油抹身，整整三個星期。

ccb.text: 期间没有吃过美味，没有尝过酒肉，没有抹过膏油。
